summary: Russian forces launched extensive drone strikes across multiple Ukrainian regions, with significant attacks targeting Poltava, Kharkiv, Kremenchuk, and Zaporizhzhia. Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions used for Russian logistics. A Russian attack on a private enterprise in Dnipro killed 4 and wounded 10, while Russia claims advances in the Dnepropetrovsk and Zaporozhye regions.
key_points: Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions, including a road bridge near Novoazovsk and two railway bridges, disrupting Russian logistics for personnel, weapons, and ammunition transfers. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)
Multiple waves of strike drones targeted Poltava region from Kharkiv region, with at least 9 Shaheds reported heading toward Poltava and 1 toward Kremenchuk. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68162)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on the city of Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66826)
A Russian attack on a private enterprise in Dnipro killed 4 people and wounded 10, with rescue operations ongoing. (Source: @UkraineNow/82259)
Russian Defense Ministry claims liberation of Bogodarovka in Dnepropetrovsk region and Pysantsy along the Vovcha River bed by Army Group 'East.' (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31243, @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In eastern Zaporozhye region, Russian forces took the settlement of Novoselovka, with Egorovka as the next objective north of Mala Tokmachka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
The commander of Ukraine's 154th Separate Mechanized Brigade, Vladimir Kononnikov, was found dead, with the cause of death under investigation. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31231)

Overnight drone raids damaged energy facilities in Zaporozhye region causing widespread power outages, while all districts of Kherson region are completely or partially without power. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions, including a road bridge near Novoazovsk and two railway bridges, disrupting Russian logistics for personnel, weapons, and ammunition transfers. Russian forces launched extensive drone strikes across Poltava, Kharkiv, Kremenchuk, and Zaporizhzhia, while tactical aviation dropped guided bombs on Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv region. A Russian attack on a private enterprise in Dnipro killed 4 and wounded 10, and Russia claims territorial advances in Dnepropetrovsk and Zaporozhye regions.

points: Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions, including a road bridge near Novoazovsk in Donetsk region and two railway bridges in Luhansk region, which the enemy uses for transferring personnel, weapons, ammunition, and materiel. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)
A Russian attack on a private enterprise in Dnipro killed 4 people and wounded 10, with rescue operations ongoing. (Source: @UkraineNow/82259)

The commander of Ukraine's 154th Separate Mechanized Brigade, Vladimir Kononnikov, was found dead, with the 'South' operational command reporting the cause of death is being established. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31231)

Ukraine's Center for Countering Disinformation stated that Russian forces have not advanced toward Sumy since spring 2025 and remain over 20 km from the city, contradicting Putin's claim of being within 10 km. (Source: @UkraineNow/82254)
Hourly power outages will begin in all regions of Ukraine on June 30 for all consumer categories due to significant growth in energy consumption from hot weather. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31255)
A Ukrainian strike on a bus depot in Kherson region destroyed civilian vehicles including 14 school buses. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on the city of Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66826)
Russian Defense Ministry claims liberation of Bogodarovka in Dnepropetrovsk region and Pysantsy along the Vovcha River bed by Army Group 'East.' (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31243, @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In eastern Zaporozhye region, Russian forces took the settlement of Novoselovka, with Egorovka as the next objective north of Mala Tokmachka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian forces in the Donetsk People's Republic report 3 residents killed and 13 wounded from Ukrainian drone strikes since the beginning of the day. (Source: @tass_agency/382979)

Overnight drone raids damaged energy facilities in Zaporozhye region causing emergency power outages across a significant part of the region, while all districts of Kherson region are completely or partially without power. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In the Bryansk region, a kamikaze drone struck a regular bus in the village of Petryatinka, Zlynkovsky district, wounding a woman. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

On the Kharkov direction, Army Group 'North' continues offensive operations in Kazachya Lopan and adjacent forest areas, and on the Vovchansk sector small-arms fighting continues in Losevka, Ukrainske, and Zemlyanoy Yar. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

On the Kharkov direction, Russian Army Group 'North' continues offensive operations in Kazachya Lopan and adjacent forest areas, with small-arms fighting in Losevka, Ukrainske, Zemlyanoy Yar, and Petro-Ivanovka on the Velyky Burluk sector. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
From the Kupyansk direction, Russian forces destroyed a bridge over the Senek River with an FAB strike to complicate enemy logistics. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In Krasny Liman and Konstantinovka, Russian forces continue assault operations in urban areas while the enemy responds with numerous drone strikes. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66826)
Multiple groups of strike drones were tracked across Kharkiv region heading in various directions including south toward Poltava and west. (Source: @kpszsu/66834, @kpszsu/66836, @kpszsu/66809)

On the Sumy direction in Shostka district, Russian assault troops continue small-arms battles in Bachevsk and surroundings, while fighting also continues in Pysarevka, Marino, Novaya Sech, and forest areas of Krasnopolye district. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

In the Belgorod region, Rakitnansky district, an FPV drone attacked a commercial facility in Proletarsky, causing a woman to sustain barotrauma. Settlements under attack include Vyazovoye, Nizhneye Berezovo-Vtoroye, Gora-Podol, Proletarsky, Dolgoye, Oktyabrsky, and Berezovka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In the Bryansk region, a kamikaze drone struck a regular bus in the village of Petryatinka, Zlynkovsky district, wounding a woman. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Drones were tracked heading toward Kharkiv from the north and toward Men in Chernihiv region from the northwest. (Source: @kpszsu/66812)
On the Sumy direction, Russian forces continue operations in Shostka, Sumy, and Krasnopolye districts with small-arms battles and forest fighting. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on the city of Zaporizhzhia. (Source: @kpszsu/66829)
In the eastern Zaporozhye region, Russian forces took Novoselovka, with Egorovka as the next objective north of Mala Tokmachka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

Overnight drone raids damaged energy facilities in Zaporozhye region causing emergency power outages, while all districts of Kherson region are completely or partially without power. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
A Ukrainian strike on a bus depot in Kherson region destroyed civilian vehicles including 14 school buses. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
In the Dnepropetrovsk direction, Russian Army Group 'East' claims liberation of Pysantsy, advancing along the Vovcha River bed, and Bogodarovka. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237, @ukr_leaks_eng/31243)

Crimea and Sevastopol repelled an overnight drone attack, with air raid warnings sounding again by morning and at least 2 UAVs shot down; the Crimean Bridge has been closed since night. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

Multiple waves of strike drones targeted Poltava region from Kharkiv region, with at least 9 Shaheds reported toward Poltava, 1 toward Kremenchuk, and 3 Shaheds from Kharkiv region toward Poltava region. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68162)

Strike drones were tracked from Kharkiv region toward Poltava, south-southeast of Poltava heading south, east of Bogodukhiv heading south, and north of Pavlohograd on the border of Dnipropetrovsk and Kharkiv regions toward Poltava region. (Source: @kpszsu/66837, @kpszsu/66825, @kpszsu/66831, @kpszsu/66836)

Groups of strike drones were tracked east of Kharkiv region heading west, toward Sakhnovshchyna from the north, and toward Kushuhum in Zaporizhzhia region from the south. (Source: @kpszsu/66834, @kpszsu/66809, @kpszsu/66810)

In Poltava region, 3 reactive drones were reported in Zavodsky district, and 4 drones tracked from Yuriivka past Perechepyne toward Kobyelyaky, with additional groups past Chutove and 2 more in Kharkiv region. (Source: @eRadarrua/98713, @eRadarrua/98720, @eRadarrua/98741)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66826)

In Dnipropetrovsk region, 4 drone groups targeted Yuriivka from Dobropillya; in Zaporizhzhia region, 3 drones near Vilnyansk; in Chernihiv region, a guided drone near Horodnya. (Source: @eRadarrua/98712)
The number of drones intercepted on approach to Moscow since the beginning of the day exceeded 10. (Source: @tass_agency/382970)

key_developments: Ukrainian forces struck three key bridges in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk regions, including a road bridge near Novoazovsk and two railway bridges, disrupting Russian logistics for personnel, weapons, ammunition, and materiel transfers. (Source: @UkraineNow/82268)

Multiple waves of strike drones targeted Poltava region from Kharkiv region, with at least 9 Shaheds toward Poltava, 1 toward Kremenchuk, and additional groups tracked across multiple vectors. (Source: @mon1tor_ua/68162)
A Russian attack on a private enterprise in Dnipro killed 4 people and wounded 10, with rescue operations ongoing. (Source: @UkraineNow/82259)

Russian forces claim liberation of Bogodarovka in Dnepropetrovsk region and Pysantsy along the Vovcha River bed by Army Group 'East,' plus Novoselovka in eastern Zaporozhye region. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31243, @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs on the city of Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv region. (Source: @kpszsu/66829, @kpszsu/66826)

Overnight drone raids damaged energy facilities in Zaporozhye region causing widespread power outages, while all districts of Kherson region are completely or partially without power. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31237)

The commander of Ukraine's 154th Separate Mechanized Brigade, Vladimir Kononnikov, was found dead, with the cause of death under investigation by the 'South' operational command. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31231)
sections.threat_assessment: The operational tempo is escalating significantly with coordinated multi-axis drone strikes targeting Poltava, Kharkiv, Kremenchuk, and Zaporizhzhia regions simultaneously. Russian forces are pressing offensive operations across the eastern front in Kharkov, Kupyansk, Krasny Liman, and Konstantinovka directions while claiming territorial gains in Dnepropetrovsk and Zaporozhye regions. Ukrainian strikes against logistics infrastructure in occupied Donetsk and Luhansk demonstrate continued deep-strike capability against Russian supply lines. The loss of the 154th Separate Mechanized Brigade commander represents a potential leadership disruption requiring monitoring.
sections.regional_response: Belgorod and Bryansk regions continue to suffer cross-border drone attacks targeting civilian infrastructure including a bus in Petryatinka and a commercial facility in Proletarsky. The Russian MFA has demanded UN Security Council condemnation of Ukrainian strikes on a bus carrying Belarusians, while claiming Ukraine is attempting to draw NATO into direct conflict. Energy infrastructure across Zaporozhye and Kherson regions has been severely degraded by overnight drone raids, causing widespread blackouts. The Crimean Bridge remains closed following overnight drone attacks on Crimea and Sevastopol.
sections.intelligence_notes: Russian claims of territorial advances in Dnepropetrovsk and Zaporozhye regions require independent verification, as Ukrainian sources contest Russian claims of approaching Sumy within 10 km, stating Russian forces remain over 20 km away and have not advanced since spring 2025. The extensive drone activity across Poltava region from multiple vectors suggests a coordinated saturation attack pattern. The death of 154th Brigade commander Kononnikov is confirmed but circumstances remain undisclosed. Power grid restrictions across all Ukrainian regions beginning June 30 indicate growing energy strain from increased consumption during hot weather.
